## What this changes

One or two sentences on the *why*. The diff already shows the *what*.

## How I verified

- [ ] `mix precommit` passes (format, compile, tests, credo, sobelow)
- [ ] Manually verified the UX/behaviour if it's user-facing

## Notes for the reviewer

Anything non-obvious: tradeoffs considered, follow-ups deliberately deferred, regressions worth watching.
